title: Aurora, 33857, Palm Pals Boomer Monkey, 5In, Soft Toy, Brown
features: Let's meet the Palm Pals Boomer Monkey Soft Toy, the latest addition to Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This adorable Monkey plush is brown and beige in colour and filled with beans. It fits perfectly into your palm, making it great for small cuddling. A wonderful gift for any occasion!

The Boomer Monkey is part of the Palm Pals Zoo collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Craving, Pets, Craving, Critters, Aquatic, and many more. These plushies are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, featuring inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials.

Suitable from birth, the Palm Pals Boomer Monkey measures 13cm. Always up to monkey business, Boomer is one fun pal! There's always time for fun, giggles, and good vibes when Boomer enters a room. No matter the occasion, Boomer knows how to bring the party and be just the right amount of silly every time. This fun-loving Boomer Monkey will surely win everyone's hearts!

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful plush and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
description: Product Description Say hello to the Palm Pals Boomer Monkey Soft Toy, the latest addition to Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This adorable Monkey plush is brown and beige in colour and filled with beans. It fits perfectly into your palm, making it great for small cuddling, and it makes a wonderful gift for any occasion! Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, featuring inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials. Suitable from birth, the Palm Pals Boomer Monkey measures 13cm. Always up to monkey business, Boomer is one fun pal! There's always time for fun, giggles, and good vibes when Boomer enters a room. No matter the occasion, Boomer knows how to bring the party and be just the right amount of silly every time. This fun-loving Boomer Monkey will surely win everyone's hearts! The Boomer Monkey is part of the Palm Pals Zoo collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Craving, Pets, Craving, Critters, Aquatic, and many more.
